rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MAYLENE CHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Settle Successor Conservator Of The Person'S Third Report And Successor Conservator Of The Estate'S Third Acount And Report, For Payment Of Fees To Conservators' Attorney, And For Authority To Retain And Continue To Purchase Mutual Fund Fidelity Magellan
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/8/23 for CIU investigation and report to be done. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Proof of payment of the assessment fee, if ordered, must be filed before an accounting can be approved. (It appears that the title of the pleading resulted in the use of a different filing code, which did not trigger the CIU investigation.) (2) After withdrawals totaling $165,000 from the partnership, does the conservatee's share of partnership not change? There is no liabilities schedule showing the amounts to be repaid to the partnership. (3) For an interim accounting, only the ending balances must be verified by financial institution statements. Some of the pages of the statements filed on 3/13/23 are missing. (4) The Fidelity Investments statement is for the period ending 12/31/22. This account period ends 1/17/23. (5) Also, likely because of the title of the pleading, the confidential file was not delivered to the assigned examiner. If filed statements are not original, a declaration must be filed regrading what was filed or how originals will be maintained or made available to the Court. [LRSF 14.34 D. See also CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts.] (6) If bond must be increased, that must be done before an accounting can be approved. [CRC 7.204.) If there are other issues after the CIU report is completed, they will also need to be addressed before the accounting can be approved. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 7/28/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Corinne Dare was never appointed temporary conservator of the person; she was appointed general conservator of the person on 11/4/24.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDMUND SHEFFIELD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/5/23 for an amended account and petition to be filed, pursuant to the "Supplemental Declaration" filed on 5/5/23. NB: The first accounting should be for no more than TWO YEARS. [LRSF 14.34 A.] Unless the amended accounting is for just the first two years of this estate administration, or accounting is waived by all residuary beneficiaries, an appearance will be required after the amended accounting is filed. Other issues that must be (fully) addressed in the amended accounting and petition: (1) The receipt for the distribution of the $250,000 pecuniary bequest to Marilyn Rockcastle reflects that she received $17,076.50 interest for the period 1/27/16 to 10/3/16, which was 250 days. Interest should have been no more than $11,986.25. (2) Why did the executor not petition sooner to make the preliminary distribution to Marilyn Rockcastle to avoid interest altogether? Letters were issued on 5/20/15, and the temporary conservator of the estate was authorized on 10/7/15 to deliver all property but a small reserve to the executor. (3) Multiple payments to Kim Schwa[r]cz must be supported either by documents from her requesting such payments or by detailed descriptions in the amended accounting. (4) The Voya Annuity receipts (reportedly annuity overpayments) were $8,161.77, but $18,660.99 was reimbursed. Please file support for the payment negotiated by Voya on 12/17/15. Courtesy copies of the amended accounting petition, bank statements, and proof of service must be received by the assigned Examiner by 8/25/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (The payment to Clifton S. Thomas for preparing the accounting will be deducted from the executor's compensation, as accounting is one of the duties of a personal representative.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SAM HOM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting (And For Allowance Of Statutory Commissions)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/1/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The proof of service filed on 5/5/23 was incomplete at item 4a (date of mailing). (2) Furthermore, the amended petition was not e-filed (available for viewing) until 5/8/23, so the proof of service verified on 5/5/23 would indicate that notice was mailed before the amended petition was available for viewing. (3) Paragraph 6 of the amended petition is untrue: there was a creditor's claim filed on 4/6/21, which was amended on 4/8/21. (4) How did the decedent terminate Sam T Hom LLC on 2/9/21? He died on 9/7/20. (5) Prob. C. Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or BENEFICIARY has previously been confined in a prison or facility under the jurisdiction of the Department of Corrections, etc. (The niece is not an heir.) (6) Attorney costs still have not been fully itemized, including the date incurred, full description of WHAT WAS FILED, etc. (7) Cash in excess of FDIC (8) Why only $306,230.25 when real property was sold for $1,200,000, the two terminated LLCs had over $100,000, and the borrower repaid $60,000? Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 7/24/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Invalidate The Herman F. Johnson, Sr. Revocable 2010 Trust For Undue Influence And Lack Of Capacity; Constructive Trust; Exhibits 1-17; Petiton For Early Settlement Conference
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) Petition prays multiple relief other than invalidating the Trust; however, a. The caption failed to specifically set forth them (CRC 7.102); thus, b. Notice of Hearing does not set forth all relief sought (CRC 7.50). (2) Petition does not provide any authority under which the court can grant the relief in this proceeding. They appear to be premature and inappropriate in this trust proceeding. The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE REVOCABLE TRUST DECLARATION OF JOE LOUIE GARCIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/1/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] (3) The petition does not address how this is the proper venue. (4) All petitions involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries. [CRC 7.902.] There is no attachment to the petition listing the trust beneficiaries' names and addresses. The proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 7/24/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT JOHN SABA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/1/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No courtesy copies have been received by the examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] (3) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. The proposed order and courtesy copies must be received by the assigned Examiner by 7/24/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (If the petitioner is a niece, as a quick preview of the petition online indicates, all predeceased ancestors through whom the heirs would take must be clearly identified and the dates of death must be set forth if they were not. [LRSF 14.18 C.3.])
